heading: Meet Tequila
description1:
At Tequila Mockingbirds our goal is simple: to rock up and serve your guests the most delicious frozen margaritas – making your party THE one to remember.
Founders Emma and Carrie have re-imagined the classic frozen margarita and given it a fresh wellness-inspired twist.
With backgrounds rooted in health and well-being, they have created unique blends that are delicious, cleaner and naturally refreshing. Their creative menu presents their signature frozen cockatils that are crafted by using 100%  premium blue agave tequila, natural syrups and feel-good ingredients. 
No more artificial nonsense. Just good clean fun.
description2: Wherever your celebration takes flight—birthdays, graduations, weddings, or pre-dinner drinks - let Tequila Mockingbirds bring the festival energy as well as fresh and fabulous margaritas to your next event.
